---
description: 'Use when working with Prisma/Pothos generated code (generated folder), schema.prisma, Prisma models, or client regeneration. Prevents manual edits in autogenerated files.'
name: 'Prisma Generated Read-Only'
applyTo: 'src/database/prisma/generated/**'
---

# Prisma/Pothos Generated Code (read-only)

- Treat files in this folder as generated artifacts: do not edit manually.
- If you need to change types, fields, or relations, update the source of truth in `src/database/prisma/schema.prisma` or `src/database/prisma/models/`.
- After schema/model changes, regenerate artifacts with `pnpm exec prisma generate`.
- If database structure changes are required, create a migration with `pnpm exec prisma migrate dev`.
- Keep commits clean: include schema/model changes and regenerated artifacts together when appropriate.
- If a generated file looks wrong, do not patch it manually; fix the source and regenerate.
